data.title: Tim Cook's Trusted Deputies Make Beeline For The Exit Door: Apple HR Chief Latest Executive To Leave
data.description: A top management executive at Apple Inc is leaving one of the world's largest conglomerates in merely two years of joining, marking a short tenure of the senior management within the company.

data.title: M&T Bank Gears Up For Q3 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
Dow Hits Another Record Close: Investor Sentiment Improves, But Fear Index Remains In 'Greed' Zone
Nvidia Supplier TSMC Reports Q3 Revenue, Earnings Beat Amid Rising Demand For AI Chips
data.description: TSMC's earnings came as a welcome relief after ASML spooked AI hardware manufacturers with a lackluster outlook.

data.title: Donald Trump-Backed World Liberty Financial Off To A Slow Start — Raises Just 4% Of The Token Fundraising Target
data.description: Donald Trump-backed cryptocurrency project World Liberty Financial (WLFI) has been off to a slow start, managing to raise just 4% of its token presale target within the first 48 hours of its launch.
